---
name: "\U0001F41B Bug Report"
about: Create a report to help us improve the AgriPortal Authentication Gate.
title: "[BUG] - Brief description of the issue"
labels: bug
assignees: AyTech-Solution

---

## 📝 Bug Description
A clear and concise description of what the bug is. What went wrong with the login or UI?

##  Steps to Reproduce
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Go to 'https://aytech-agriportal.onrender.com'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## 🎯 Expected Behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen instead.

##  Screenshots / Video
If applicable, add screenshots or screen recordings to help explain your problem.

## 💻 Environment & Device Specs
- **OS:** [e.g. Windows 11, macOS, Android]
- **Browser:** [e.g. Chrome, Safari, Firefox]
- **Device:** [e.g. PC, iPhone 15, Samsung S24]

##  Additional Context
Add any other context about the problem here (e.g., console error logs, Firebase network responses).
